since_last: 67% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.58%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.19% · BTC +0.91% · Gold +1.75% · Nasdaq100 +1.01%. 67% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.58%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.58%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.19%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.19%, KLAC +8.82%, AMAT +8.12%, LRCX +7.63%, MU +7.21%. Laggards: AVAV -6.01%, SOUN -5.15%, PLTR -3.84%, INOD -2.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.81% at $149.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
